holdings.infoBox: RSHO is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are The Timken Company stock at 9.21%, Powell Industries at 7.86%, Cognex at 7.17%, Caterpillar at 6.63%, and Gates Industrial Corporation at 5.62%.

overview.description: The Tema U.S. Manufacturing & Reshoring ETF (RSHO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund actively manages a narrow portfolio of US stocks that are anticipated to benefit from deglobalization. The funds adviser combines a top-down and bottom-up approach to selecting and weighting fund holdings. RSHO was launched on May 11, 2023 and is issued by Tema.
